sentences.arabic: صَنَعَ الشَّابُّ مُحْتَوًى مُفِيدًا عَنْ رِحْلَاتِهِ السِّيَاحِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Mladić je napravio koristan sadržaj o svojim turističkim putovanjima.
sentences.translationEn: The young man created useful content about his tourist trips.

sentences.arabic: تَابَعَهُ آلَافُ الْأَشْخَاصِ لِأَنَّهُ يُقَدِّمُ نَصَائِحَ رَائِعَةً.
sentences.translation: Pratile su ga hiljade ljudi jer pruža odlične savjete.
sentences.translationEn: Thousands of people followed him because he provides wonderful advice.

sentences.arabic: يُؤَثِّرُ صُنَّاعُ الْمُحْتَوَى بِشَكْلٍ كَبِيرٍ عَلَى ثَقَافَةِ الشَّبَابِ.
sentences.translation: Stvaraoci sadržaja uveliko utječu na kulturu mladih.
sentences.translationEn: Content creators greatly influence youth culture.
